name: seiler-2026-theme
description: WordPress block theme for public safety organizations
author: Your Name

scripts.env:reset: npm run env:destroy && npm run env:start
scripts.env:cache:clear: ddev wp cache flush && ddev wp rewrite flush && echo 'Cache cleared.'
scripts.env:url: ddev describe --json-output | jq -r '.raw.primary_url // empty' || echo https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site
scripts.setup:homepage: npm run setup:create-homepage && npm run setup:set-homepage
scripts.setup:set-homepage: ddev wp option update show_on_front page && ddev wp option update page_on_front $(ddev wp post list --post_type=page --name=home --field=ID --format=ids)
scripts.browser:open: bash -c 'if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then explorer.exe https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; elif [[ $OSTYPE == darwin* ]]; then open https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; else xdg-open https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; fi'
scripts.browser:chrome: bash -c 'if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then cmd.exe /c start chrome https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then open -a "Google Chrome" https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; else google-chrome https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; fi'
scripts.browser:firefox: bash -c 'if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then cmd.exe /c start firefox https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; elif [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then open -a Firefox https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; else firefox https://seiler-2026-theme.ddev.site; fi'
